deleteAccount.errorMessage: Enwere njehie n'inyefee arịrịọ gị. Biko gbalịa ọzọ ma emechaa ma ọ bụ kpọtụrụ ndị na-enyere anyị aka ozugbo.

sos.title: Enyemaka Mberede SOS
sos.subtitle: Ziga ozi mberede ozugbo na CARITAS Nigeria, ndị uwe ojii, na ndị otu nzaghachi obodo.
sos.clickToInstruction: Pịa bọtịnụ dị n'okpuru ka i ziga SOS ozugbo nwere ebe ị nọ.
sos.emergencyTypeSelect: Họrọ ụdị mberede iji nyere ndị na-anabata mberede aka ịkwadebe enyemaka kwesịrị ekwesị
sos.additionalInfoDesc: Nye nkọwa ọ bụla ọzọ iji nyere ndị na-anabata mberede aka ịghọta ọnọdụ gị
sos.additionalInfoPlaceholder: Dịka ọmụmaatụ, Ọnụ ọgụgụ ndị ihe metụtara, mkpa ahụike pụrụ iche, ebe ama ama...
sos.locationDesc: Anyị chọrọ nhazi ebe gị iji ziga ndị na-anabata mberede
sos.locationAccessRequiredDesc: Biko kwe ka ị nweta ebe iji chọpụta ebe ị nọ ozugbo. Lelee barra adresị ebe nchọgharị gị ma ọ bụ ntọala sistemụ.
sos.troubleshootDesc: Ihe a bụ otú e si agbanwe nsogbu geolocation:
sos.troubleshootStep1_1: Go to System Settings → Privacy & Security → Location Services.
sos.troubleshootStep1_3: Ensure Google Chrome is toggled ON.
sos.troubleshootStep2Desc: Toggling Wi-Fi off and on can sometimes force a location refresh.
sos.troubleshootStep3Desc: If GPS persists in failing, please use the 'Enter Location Manually' option to ensure responders can find you.
sos.specificAddressLabel: Adresị Pụrụ Iche / Ebe Ama Ama
sos.specificAddressPlaceholder: Biko nye nkọwa zuru ezu banyere ebe ị nọ ugbu a iji nyere ndị na-anabata mberede aka ịchọta gị.
sos.worksOnNetworks: Na-arụ ọrụ na MTN, Airtel, Glo, 9mobile
sos.ussdCodesNotAvailable: Koodu USSD adịghị maka ebe ị nọ.
sos.nextStep1: E zigara ọkwa gị na CARITAS na ndị na-anabata mberede.
sos.nextStep2: Ndị otu nkwado anyị ga-agbalị ịkpọtụrụ gị ozugbo.
sos.nextStep3: A na-eziga ndị na-anabata mberede na ebe GPS gị.
sos.nextStep4: Biko debe eriri ekwentị gị ma nọrọ n'ebe dị nchebe.
sos.locationErrorDesc: Anyị enweghị ike ịchọta ebe ị nọ.
sos.locationRequiredDesc: Biko debe ikike ebe ma ọ bụ tinye adresị gị tupu i ziga SOS.
sos.detailsRequiredDesc: Biko nye steeti na adresị iji tinye ebe n'onwe gị.
sos.sosSentDesc: A gwara ndị na-anabata mberede banyere ọnọdụ gị.
sos.sosFailedDesc: Ihe emegidela n'izigara SOS. Biko jiri USSD koodu.
